title: Build AI Apps with Claude Code  | Full Tutorial for Beginners (Desktop + Terminal + VS Code)
summary: A tutorial building an agentic AI application using Claude Code across three interfaces: Desktop App, Terminal, and VS Code. The project demonstrates a resume and cover letter generator that provides personalized suggestions and multiple themes. The video covers installation, setup, and common workflows including Plan Mode, token usage, and error debugging.
